title: TokenUsageReport
description: Normalized token usage report — combines provider-reported actuals with pre-call estimates.

estimated_completion_tokens.description: Pre-call estimated completion tokens (often 0 before response)

actual_prompt_tokens.description: Provider-reported input token count, or null if unavailable

actual_completion_tokens.description: Provider-reported output token count, or null if unavailable

actual_total_tokens.description: Provider-reported total, or null if unavailable

model.description: Model identifier used for this request

tokenizer_method.description: Method used for pre-call token estimation

usage_source.description: Whether actual counts came from the provider or are estimates

reason_code.description: Diagnostic reason code when usage is unavailable or abnormal

trace_ref.description: Reference to the ContextAssemblyTrace that produced this request
